'''Jayl''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who worked for the [[Senate Head of Public Affairs Office]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], she was employed as an assistant to [[Mar Rugeyan]], the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] [[Senate Head of Public Affairs|Head of Public Affairs]]. She assisted Rugeyan and [[Kal Skirata]] during a [[Mission to Coruscant (Clone Wars)|anti-terror operation]] which took place on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].
